BACK-END EFT SALE
WEIGH-IN INTRODUCTION
Look them up. Get their starting weight, goal (bodyfat percentage or weight),
and a contract ready.
Get them on the scale as soon as they walk in the door.
“Alright, are you ready for the moment of truth??”
Client gets on the scale.
If they are a weight loss client, no matter how much they lost, give them a
double high-five and congratulate them on their progress.
_Weight_! That’s awesome! You lost _Weight Loss_ pounds in 6 weeks. That’s
fantastic. How do you feel??
Client - I feel good, but I still have more to lose.
Great. How about your clothes, how are your clothes fitting you? Are you getting
closer to bikini season?
Client - They’re definitely fitting better.
TRANSITION TO SALE
Great. So, you started here at _Starting Weight_ 6 weeks ago. What were you doing
before you got here?
Client - Nothing really.
I know that feeling, just not being able to get started. How long were you there for?
How long have you been trying to lose weight before this?
What else has worked besides our amazing program?
But keeping it off has been the problem, right?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

So, you’re looking to lose weight for good, because there’s no point in losing weight
for just a month or two only to gain it back again right? Why bother?
So what is your LONG term goal? How much weight, or what size do you need to be?
Awesome. I think we can help you get there I mean, if you lost even _Weight
Between Current and Goal_ pounds here in 6 weeks, imagine what you’re going to
look like in 6 months.
So the big question is…. DO YOU WANT TO KEEP LOSING WEIGHT OR QUIT?”
Client - I want to keep losing, but I need to know your prices because I’m a single
mom…
Totally! Well, I’m pumped to help you make this into a lifestyle and get you to _Their
Goal Weight_ in the next 6 months. I mean, if in 6 months, you walked in here a size
_Goal Size_ because of all the work we did together, how would you feel?
Great! So let’s get it.
Explanation of your challenge (42 Day Detox, 6 Week Challenge, etc.).
Example for 6 Week Challenge:
The way it works is you get $10lb or $50 per % point of bodyfat lost, so
you still have $160 of credit towards staying. Which means, if you want
to get to YOUR GOAL, what most people do is we credit it forward for 6
months, which at our normal rate is $200/mo, but with your $160
discount, if you divide that over 6 months, will bring it down to $175/mo
etc…
Great. Do you want to use the card you have on file?
Sign here. And let’s set your appointment for your new nutrition plan, food consult…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
